violations.text: Cheese pie/spinach pie was observed held at 70 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Pies were being held out for sale. Pies were moved to refrigerator for cooling. Pies were cooked 1 hour prior to temperature being taken. If establishment is to sell items at ambient temperature they are to apply for a Time Variance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on prep unit 1. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2026
The floor in the kitchen is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2026

The walls in the prep area are not constructed of non-absorbent material. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2026

The door to the outside, located in the front and back of the establishment, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2025
